sub_pixel_system.notes: Grid-based puzzle game; no sub-pixel movement system documented

special_mechanics.name: grid-based movement
special_mechanics.description: Player moves one square at a time horizontally or vertically onto empty floor squares. Discrete tile-based movement system, not continuous physics.

special_mechanics.name: box pushing
special_mechanics.description: Player can push boxes to adjacent empty squares. Only one box can be pushed at a time. Boxes cannot be pulled, only pushed. Boxes block further movement if against walls or other boxes.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Sokoban is a puzzle game with grid-based mechanics, not a physics-based platformer. No gravity, jump physics, sub-pixel systems, or continuous movement physics are relevant. Movement is deterministic and tile-based. Documentation sources available only describe high-level gameplay and history, not low-level movement parameters.
